params.name: Coronation of Napoleon
params.description:
On Apr 21, 1804 AD, Napoleon refused to let Pope Pius VII crown him and took the crown from the pope to put it on his own head.
The Coronation of Napoleon by Jacques-Louis David is an oil painting that depicts the scene of Napoleon's coronation ceremony at Notre Dame de Paris. David carefully chose the moment when the emperor's wife was being crowned to highlight Napoleon's central position in the painting, without making the pope uncomfortable. With over 100 characters in different costumes, …
